title: Ben Roy Mottelson
body: Ben Roy Mottelson (9 July 1926 – 13 May 2022) was an American-Danish nuclear physicist. He won the 1975 Nobel Prize in Physics for his work on the non-spherical geometry of atomic nuclei.
categories: Fellows of Bangladesh Academy of Sciences
Foreign associates of the National Academy of Sciences
Members of the American Philosophical Society
Members of the Norwegian Academy of Science and Letters
